title: Coalesce Bursty Events with select in Go
summary: Merge rapid Go events into fewer downstream batches with select, one timer, and a quiet window.
highlights: Merges rapid events into one batch
Flushes pending events on input close
verification_notes: Run from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4. The verified test suite covers input validation, quiet-window batching, flush-on-close behavior, and context cancellation.
